definitions.text: Culpability for something negative or undesirable.
examples: The blame for starting the fire lies with the arsonist.
They accepted the blame, but it was an accident.

definitions.text: To assert or consider that someone is the cause of something negative; to place blame; to attribute responsibility (for something negative or for doing something negative).
examples: The student driver was blamed for the accident.
After what happened at the wedding, I wouldn't blame you if you never spoke to them again.

definitions.text: To assert the cause of some bad event.
examples: We blamed the accident on the student driver.

definitions.text: To censure (someone or something); to criticize.
